name: Pork Barbecue & Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 lb (2 cups) Boneless Pork Butt, cooked, shredded
6 oz Wide egg noodles, cooked, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat corn oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and green pepper. Cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes or until thickened.
6. Toss with noodles.
